title: The Box That Pip Built
shortDescription: Push fragments together to assemble complete boxes.
description: Move one step per turn. Walk into a box fragment to push it one cell in your direction. When two fragments touch face-to-face, those touching sides join, and a joined cluster moves as a single piece — so you can push it from any of its outer sides. A fragment is complete when all four of its sides are joined (to another fragment or to the board edge). Win by maneuvering every fragment onto a target cell so each one ends up complete. Rocks block movement; pick up a pickaxe and walk into a rock to break it.
